title: Joe Rogan says Trump might have messed up with the Iran War
shortDescription: Joe Rogan criticized President Donald Trump on a recent episode of his podcast saying that he may have 'f—ed it up' by starting a war with Iran.

title: Latest White House renovation? Iconic entrance columns get makeover
shortDescription: A White House official said July 9 that the columns are undergoing standard restoration work.

title: Work progressing on White House column renovations
shortDescription: Another White House renovation project is ramping up as President Trump expands his makeover to the iconic columns outside the main entrance.

title: Scaffolding surrounds White House North Portico
shortDescription: Renovation work continues as the White House North Portico gets wrapped in tarp and scaffolding during construction on the historic grounds.

title: Ossoff leads in GA Senate race polling. Governor race leader less clear
shortDescription: Two recent polls have shown Democrat Jon Ossoff leading in the Georgia Senate race, but they are split on who leads for governor.

title: Trump swapped out of Qatari-gifted Air Force One as a precaution
shortDescription: President Trump took the old Air Force One from Turkey instead of the new plane gifted by Qatar as a security precaution amid hostilities with Iran.

title: First round of 'Trump Accounts' deposits made in July
shortDescription: President Trump said the government had deposited the first $1,000 into more than 500,000 "Trump Accounts," designed to give newborn Americans a stake in the stock market and help build wealth from an early age.

title: Dems are at war – with each other. What's next in insurgents v. establishment?
shortDescription: The scramble to replace Graham Platner on Maine's U.S. Senate ballot is only one of the showdowns this summer over the Democrats' direction.

title: Trumps celebrate the new Donald J. Trump airport with inaugural flight
shortDescription: The Palm Beach airport is now the President Donald J. Trump International Airport. The Palm Beach Post saw the first flight after the renaming.

title: What's the deal with Freedom Fuel gas stations? Latest from Trump
shortDescription: Trump's Freedom Fuel is selling gas at $3.47/gal in Pennsylvania and New Jersey.

title: Palm Beach airport renamed President Donald Trump International
shortDescription: The major Florida airport near Mar-a-Lago has changed its name to President Donald J. Trump International Airport this July.

title: What’s next for Dems after Platner’s exit?
shortDescription: Dems under pressure to find a new nominee and more news to know Thursday.

title: Palm Beach airport renamed after Trump. What else bears his name?
shortDescription: Trump has long used his name as the cornerstone of his real estate empire's branding. Here's what else in the public domain is named after him.

title: Monumental proposal draws national attention for Trump's arch in DC
shortDescription: President Trump is pushing for a 250-foot "Triumphal Arch" near Memorial Bridge between Arlington Cemetery and the Lincoln Memorial.

title: 60% Americans say Trump uses office for his benefit: poll
shortDescription: A majority of Americans say President Donald Trump is using his office for personal gain, according to the latest Economist/YouGov poll.

title: Platner drops out of Senate race after allegation
shortDescription: Facing a slew of controversies including a sexual assault allegation, Graham Platner dropped out of the closely watched Maine Senate race.

title: Graham Platner drops out of Senate race, ending tumultuous campaign
shortDescription: Facing a slew of controversies including a sexual assault allegation, Graham Platner dropped out of the closely watched Maine Senate race.

title: Trump to ask Supreme Court to reconsider birthright citizenship case
shortDescription: President Trump said he plans to ask the Supreme Court to rehear the birthright citizenship case in a long-shot bid for the decision to be reversed.

title: Platner exit leaves Dems' Senate plans in disarray. What's next?
shortDescription: Democrats' Senate hopes depend largely on replacing Republican Susan Collins with a Dem in Maine, the one GOP-held state conservatives lost in 2024.

title: Trump backs Freedom Fuel Network. How much are gas prices?
shortDescription: Freedom Fuel stations are selling gas below the national average, but questions remain about its ownership, funding and fuel supply.

title: Graham Platner ends Maine Senate campaign, will withdraw from ballot
shortDescription: As Graham Platner exits, Maine Dems plan nominating convention in coming weeks as they aim to unseat Susan Collins and take back the U.S. Senate.

title: Judge orders Trump to pay E. Jean Carroll $5.8 million
shortDescription: A federal judge ordered Trump to pay E. Jean Carroll $5.8 million after a New York jury found him liable for sexual abuse.

title: Trump confuses 'Islamic Republic of Japan' for Iran in NATO remarks
shortDescription: President Donald Trump mistakenly said the "Islamic Republic of Japan" fired 111 missiles at a U.S. aircraft carrier.
